# o2-scalpel-lean

Scalpel refactor MCP server for Lean 4 via lean

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-lean --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `lean` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .lean

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply tactic suggestions and auto-fixable diagnostics (quickfix) |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
